heading: Reimbursement of Senate day care center employees
label: 2065 Reimbursement of Senate day care center employees
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 214e of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
amendments: CodificationSection was classified to section 214e of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002

children.heading: Cost of training classes, conferences, and related expenses
children.label: a Cost of training classes, conferences, and related expenses
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Secretary of the Senate may reimburse any individual employed by the Senate day care center for the cost of training classes and conferences in connection with the provision of child care services and for travel, transportation, and subsistence expenses incurred in connection with the training classes and conferences.section 1345 of title 31

children.heading: Documentation
children.label: b Documentation
children.text: The Senate day care center shall certify and provide appropriate documentation to the Secretary of the Senate with respect to any reimbursement under this section. Reimbursements under this section shall be made from the appropriations account “MISCELLANEOUS ITEMS” within the contingent fund of the Senate on vouchers approved by the Secretary of the Senate.

children.heading: Regulations and limitations
children.label: c Regulations and limitations
children.text: Reimbursements under this section shall be subject to the regulations and limitations prescribed by the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate for travel and related expenses for which payment is authorized to be made from the contingent fund of the Senate.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: This section shall be effective on and after .October 1, 1996
